title: Remove any quotes around distribution id
body:
Some distributions add extra quotes, even to fields like ID that doesn't really need them. Make sure to remove them too.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Closes #19340

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Extra quotes around the distribution name removed from podman info output
```


Tested with ubuntu and fedora coreos, that does not have quotes.

```
NAME="Fedora Linux"
VERSION="38.20230709.2.0 (CoreOS)"
ID=fedora
VERSION_ID=38
```

```yaml
  distribution:
    distribution: fedora
    variant: coreos
    version: "38"
```

And verified against centos stream, which does have extra quotes.

```
NAME="CentOS Stream"
VERSION="9"
ID="centos"
ID_LIKE="rhel fedora"
```

```yaml
  distribution:
    distribution: centos
    version: "9"
```

comments.body:
No way to tell the difference between CentOS Linux and CentOS Stream, except for the NAME.

```diff
-NAME="CentOS Linux"
+NAME="CentOS Stream"
 VERSION="8"
 ID="centos"
 ID_LIKE="rhel fedora"
 VERSION_ID="8"
 PLATFORM_ID="platform:el8"
-PRETTY_NAME="CentOS Linux 8"
+PRETTY_NAME="CentOS Stream 8"
 ANSI_COLOR="0;31"
 CPE_NAME="cpe:/o:centos:centos:8"
 HOME_URL="https://centos.org/"

```
The build errors (stream-9/rawhide) are a known packit problem regarding rpm macro `golang_arches_future`.
